member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient
member.summary: Thin HTTP wrapper around the Audiobookshelf REST API. One instance per ABS API token — obtain instances via .

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.HttpClientName
member.summary: Named client key registered with .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Memory.IMemoryCache,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: ABS server base URL (no trailing slash).
ABS API bearer token for this client instance.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.GetLibrariesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all ABS libraries the token has access to. Cached for 5 minutes.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.GetLibraryItemsAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a page of items from a library. Cached per (libraryId, page, limit) for 5 minutes.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.GetItemAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns full detail for a single library item. Cached for 5 minutes.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.GetProgressAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the current user's listening progress for a library item. Not cached — always fetches fresh data.
member.returns: Progress data or null if not found.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.UpdateProgressAsync(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the current user's listening progress for a library item.
member.param: Whether the item is marked as finished.
Whether to hide from continue listening.
Seconds remaining to auto-mark as finished (default 10).
Optional Unix ms timestamp for local sync.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.BatchUpdateProgressAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.ProgressBatchItem},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Batch updates progress for multiple items. Used for local sync with lastUpdate timestamps.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.GetItemsInProgressAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all items currently in progress for the user.
member.param: Maximum number of items to return (default 25).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.StartPlaybackSessionAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts an ABS playback session and returns the session data including audio track URLs.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.SyncSessionAsync(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Syncs an open playback session with the current position.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.CloseSessionAsync(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Closes an open playback session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.GetOpenSessionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all currently open playback sessions (admin only). Used at startup to close orphaned Jellyfin sessions.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.SyncLocalSessionAsync(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Syncs a local session (for mobile/offline sync).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.GetCurrentUserAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the ABS user associated with this client's token. Used for connection testing and user validation.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.Token
member.summary: Gets the raw ABS API token used by this client (for URL construction).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient.GetAllUsersAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all users from the ABS server (admin only). Each user includes their API token.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsOpenSessionsResponse
member.summary: Wrapper for open sessions response from GET /api/sessions/open.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsOpenSessionsResponse.Sessions
member.summary: Gets or sets the open sessions.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsAllUsersResponse
member.summary: Wrapper for all users response from GET /api/users.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsAllUsersResponse.Users
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of all users.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsItemsInProgressResponse
member.summary: Response from GET /api/me/items-in-progress.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsItemsInProgressResponse.LibraryItems
member.summary: Gets or sets the library items in progress.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.ProgressBatchItem
member.summary: Payload for batch progress updates via PATCH /api/me/progress/batch/update.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.ProgressBatchItem.LibraryItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets the library item ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.ProgressBatchItem.EpisodeId
member.summary: Gets or sets the episode ID for podcasts (optional).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.ProgressBatchItem.CurrentTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the current playback position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.ProgressBatchItem.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.ProgressBatchItem.Progress
member.summary: Gets or sets the fractional progress (0.0–1.0).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.ProgressBatchItem.IsFinished
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the item is finished.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.ProgressBatchItem.LastUpdate
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unix ms timestamp for local sync.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SessionSyncPayload
member.summary: Payload for session sync via POST /api/session/:id/sync.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SessionSyncPayload.CurrentTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the current playback position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SessionSyncPayload.TimeListened
member.summary: Gets or sets the total time listened in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SessionSyncPayload.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the total duration in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SessionSyncPayload.DisplayTitle
member.summary: Gets or sets the display title (optional).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SessionSyncPayload.PlayMethod
member.summary: Gets or sets the play method (optional).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SessionClosePayload
member.summary: Payload for session close via POST /api/session/:id/close.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SessionClosePayload.CurrentTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the current playback position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SessionClosePayload.TimeListened
member.summary: Gets or sets the total time listened in seconds.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.LocalSessionPayload
member.summary: Payload for local session sync via POST /api/session/local.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.LocalSessionPayload.LibraryItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets the library item ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.LocalSessionPayload.EpisodeId
member.summary: Gets or sets the episode ID for podcasts (optional).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.LocalSessionPayload.CurrentTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the current playback position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.LocalSessionPayload.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.LocalSessionPayload.LastUpdate
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unix ms timestamp of the update.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.LocalSessionPayload.IsFinished
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the item is finished.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClientFactory
member.summary: Creates and caches instances keyed by API token.
member.remarks: Token-scoped clients are cached so we don't recreate the underlying on every request. The cache is cleared when the plugin configuration changes.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClientFactory.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Memory.IMemoryCache,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClient})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Factory for creating named HTTP clients.
Shared memory cache passed to each client.
Logger passed to each created client.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClientFactory.GetClientForToken(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a client configured for the given token, creating one if necessary.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClientFactory.GetAdminClient
member.summary: Returns a client using the configured admin API token.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClientFactory.GetClientForUser(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the best available client for a Jellyfin user ID: the per-user token if configured, otherwise the admin token.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClientFactory.InvalidateAll
member.summary: Clears all cached client instances (e.g. after a configuration change).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioFile
member.summary: Represents a raw audio file stored in an ABS library item.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioFile.Ino
member.summary: Gets or sets the inode identifier used in file URLs.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioFile.Metadata
member.summary: Gets or sets the metadata of this file.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioFile.Index
member.summary: Gets or sets the track index within the book.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioFile.Codec
member.summary: Gets or sets the audio codec, e.g. "mp3".

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioFile.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration of this file in seconds.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioFileMetadata
member.summary: File-level metadata for an audio file.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioFileMetadata.Filename
member.summary: Gets or sets the file name (with extension).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioFileMetadata.Ext
member.summary: Gets or sets the file extension including the dot, e.g. ".mp3".

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioTrack
member.summary: A playable audio track returned inside a playback session or expanded library item. Each track corresponds to one audio file in a multi-file audiobook.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioTrack.Index
member.summary: Gets or sets the index within the book (1-based).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioTrack.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the track duration in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioTrack.StartOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the start offset of this track within the full book timeline, in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioTrack.ContentUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the relative content URL, e.g. /api/items/:id/file/:ino. Append ?token=<absToken> before passing to Jellyfin.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioTrack.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the track title.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioTrack.MimeType
member.summary: Gets or sets the MIME type, e.g. "audio/mpeg".

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAudioTrack.Codec
member.summary: Gets or sets the codec string, e.g. "mp3" or "aac".

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAuthorMinified
member.summary: A minified author reference embedded in book metadata.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAuthorMinified.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the author UUID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAuthorMinified.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the author's full name.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAuthor
member.summary: Full author detail returned by GET /api/authors/:id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAuthor.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the author biography.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAuthor.Asin
member.summary: Gets or sets the ASIN for the author page.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsAuthor.ImagePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the author's image on the ABS host.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBook
member.summary: The media object of an ABS book-type library item.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBook.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the book UUID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBook.Metadata
member.summary: Gets or sets the rich metadata for this book.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBook.CoverPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the cover image on the ABS host (may be null if no cover).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBook.Tags
member.summary: Gets or sets the user-defined tags.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBook.AudioFiles
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw audio files in this book.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBook.Chapters
member.summary: Gets or sets the chapter list (full book timeline, all files merged).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBook.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the total duration of the audiobook in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBook.Tracks
member.summary: Gets or sets the playable audio tracks (populated when ?expanded=1 is used or returned by POST /api/items/:id/play).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata
member.summary: Metadata fields for an ABS audiobook.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the book title.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Subtitle
member.summary: Gets or sets the subtitle.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Authors
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of authors.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Narrators
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of narrator names.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Series
member.summary: Gets or sets the series associations (with sequence).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Genres
member.summary: Gets or sets the genre list.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.PublishedYear
member.summary: Gets or sets the published year as a string (ABS stores it as STRING, not integer). May be null, empty, or non-numeric — always use int.TryParse.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Publisher
member.summary: Gets or sets the publisher name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the book description (may contain HTML).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Isbn
member.summary: Gets or sets the ISBN.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Asin
member.summary: Gets or sets the ASIN (Amazon Standard Identification Number).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Language
member.summary: Gets or sets the language code.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Explicit
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the content is explicit.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.Abridged
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this is an abridged edition.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.AuthorName
member.summary: Gets or sets the comma-joined author name string (expanded only).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.NarratorName
member.summary: Gets or sets the comma-joined narrator name string (expanded only).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookMetadata.SeriesName
member.summary: Gets or sets the series name + sequence string (expanded only).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsChapter
member.summary: A chapter entry within an ABS audiobook. start and end are floating-point seconds relative to the full book timeline.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsChapter.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the chapter index.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsChapter.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets the start position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsChapter.End
member.summary: Gets or sets the end position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsChapter.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the chapter title (may be empty).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibrary
member.summary: An Audiobookshelf library returned by GET /api/libraries.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibrary.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the library UUID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibrary.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibrary.MediaType
member.summary: Gets or sets the media type: "book" or "podcast".

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibrary.Icon
member.summary: Gets or sets the library icon identifier.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibrariesResponse
member.summary: Wrapper returned by GET /api/libraries.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibrariesResponse.Libraries
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of libraries.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem
member.summary: A library item (book or podcast) returned by ABS library and item endpoints.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the library item UUID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem.Ino
member.summary: Gets or sets the inode of the item's folder/file.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem.Path
member.summary: Gets or sets the absolute file system path on the ABS host.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem.RelPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path relative to the library folder.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem.MediaType
member.summary: Gets or sets the media type: "book" or "podcast".

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem.LibraryId
member.summary: Gets or sets the library ID this item belongs to.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem.Media
member.summary: Gets or sets the book media object (present when mediaType is "book").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem.AddedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unix epoch milliseconds when the item was added.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unix epoch milliseconds of the last update.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem.IsMissing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the item's files are missing from disk.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItemsResponse
member.summary: Paged response from GET /api/libraries/:id/items.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItemsResponse.Results
member.summary: Gets or sets the items on the current page.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItemsResponse.Total
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of items across all pages.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItemsResponse.Page
member.summary: Gets or sets the current page index (0-based).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItemsResponse.Limit
member.summary: Gets or sets the page size limit.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress
member.summary: A user's listening progress for a library item or podcast episode, returned by GET /api/me/progress/:libraryItemId.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the progress UUID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.LibraryItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets the library item ID this progress applies to.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.EpisodeId
member.summary: Gets or sets the episode ID for podcast episodes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.MediaItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets the media item ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.MediaItemType
member.summary: Gets or sets the media item type: "book" or "podcastEpisode".

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the total duration in seconds (from item metadata).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.CurrentTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the current playback position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.Progress
member.summary: Gets or sets the fractional progress (0.0–1.0).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.IsFinished
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the item has been marked as finished.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.HideFromContinueListening
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to hide from continue listening.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.EbookLocation
member.summary: Gets or sets the ebook location for ebook progress.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.EbookProgress
member.summary: Gets or sets the ebook progress (0.0–1.0).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.LastUpdate
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unix epoch milliseconds of the last update.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.StartedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unix epoch milliseconds when playback started.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsMediaProgress.FinishedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unix epoch milliseconds when the item was finished (null if not finished).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession
member.summary: A playback session returned by POST /api/items/:id/play.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the session UUID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.LibraryItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets the library item ID being played.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.CurrentTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the current playback position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the total duration in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.AudioTracks
member.summary: Gets or sets the audio tracks for this session. Each track has a contentUrl and startOffset.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.Chapters
member.summary: Gets or sets the chapters for the full book timeline.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.PlayMethod
member.summary: Gets or sets the play method: 0 = DirectPlay, 1 = DirectStream, 2 = Transcode.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.MediaPlayer
member.summary: Gets or sets the media player identifier sent during session creation.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.DisplayTitle
member.summary: Gets or sets the item display title.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.DisplayAuthor
member.summary: Gets or sets the item display author.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsPlaybackSession.CoverPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the cover URL for this session's item.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsSeriesMinified
member.summary: A minified series reference embedded in book metadata.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsSeriesMinified.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the series UUID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsSeriesMinified.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the series name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsSeriesMinified.Sequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the book's position within this series (may be "1", "1.5", etc.).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser
member.summary: An ABS user returned by GET /api/me or GET /api/users.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the user UUID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.Username
member.summary: Gets or sets the username.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.Email
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's email address.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the user type: "root", "admin", "user", or "guest".

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.IsActive
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the account is active.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.IsLocked
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the account is locked.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.LastSeen
member.summary: Gets or sets the last seen timestamp.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.Permissions
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's permissions object.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.Bookmarks
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's bookmarks.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.ExtraData
member.summary: Gets or sets extra data.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.Token
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's API token (admin only for non-own users).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the user was created.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUser.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the user was last updated.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions
member.summary: User permissions from Audiobookshelf.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions.CanDownload
member.summary: Gets or sets whether user can download.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions.CanUpdate
member.summary: Gets or sets whether user can update.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions.CanDelete
member.summary: Gets or sets whether user can delete.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions.CanUpload
member.summary: Gets or sets whether user can upload.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions.CanAccessExplicitContent
member.summary: Gets or sets whether user can access explicit content.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions.CanAccessAllLibraries
member.summary: Gets or sets whether user can access all libraries.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions.CanAccessAllTags
member.summary: Gets or sets whether user can access all tags.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions.CanCreateEReader
member.summary: Gets or sets whether user can create e-reader devices.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions.LibrariesAccessible
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of accessible library IDs.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsUserPermissions.ItemTagsSelected
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected item tags.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookmark
member.summary: An audiobook bookmark.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookmark.LibraryItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets the library item ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookmark.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the bookmark title.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookmark.Time
member.summary: Gets or sets the bookmark time in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsBookmark.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the creation timestamp.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserDiscoveryController
member.summary: Controller for user discovery and mapping between Jellyfin and Audiobookshelf.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: HTTP client factory for proxied requests.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserDiscoveryController.TestConnection(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Proxies a connection test to an Audiobookshelf server. The token is read from the X-Abs-Token request header so it is never exposed in the browser's network inspector as a direct outbound call to ABS.
member.returns: Username on success, error message on failure.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserDiscoveryController.DiscoverUsers(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Discovers and matches users between Jellyfin and Audiobookshelf. The ABS admin token is read from the X-Abs-Token request header to avoid logging it in Jellyfin's access log.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserDiscoveryController.SaveMappings(Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SaveMappingsRequest)
member.summary: Saves the selected user mappings.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.TestConnectionResponse
member.summary: Response from the TestConnection proxy endpoint.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.TestConnectionResponse.Success
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the connection succeeded.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.TestConnectionResponse.Username
member.summary: Gets or sets the ABS username returned by GET /api/me on success.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.TestConnectionResponse.Error
member.summary: Gets or sets a human-readable error message on failure.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserDiscoveryResponse
member.summary: Response containing user discovery results.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserDiscoveryResponse.Matches
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of user matches.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserMatchDto
member.summary: DTO for a user match between Jellyfin and ABS.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserMatchDto.JellyfinUserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin user ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserMatchDto.JellyfinUsername
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin username.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserMatchDto.AbsUserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the ABS user ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserMatchDto.AbsUsername
member.summary: Gets or sets the ABS username.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserMatchDto.MatchType
member.summary: Gets or sets the match type (exact, fuzzy, none).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.UserMatchDto.IsSelected
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this match is selected for linking.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SaveMappingsRequest
member.summary: Request to save user mappings.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SaveMappingsRequest.Matches
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of matches to save.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SaveMappingsResponse
member.summary: Response containing the number of mappings saved.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.SaveMappingsResponse.SavedCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of mappings saved.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.UserTokenEntry
member.summary: Serializable key-value pair for user→token mappings. cannot be XML-serialized by Jellyfin's internal XmlSerializer because it implements IDictionary.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.UserTokenEntry.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin user ID (GUID string).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.UserTokenEntry.Token
member.summary: Gets or sets the ABS API token (JWT).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration persisted as XML by .
member.remarks: Do NOT add JSON attributes to this class — Jellyfin serialises it with its internal IXmlSerializer, not System.Text.Json. Do NOT use — it implements IDictionary and cannot be XML-serialized. Use of a custom entry class instead.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.AbsServerUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the Audiobookshelf server base URL (no trailing slash). Example: http://192.168.1.10:13378 or https://abs.example.com.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.AdminApiToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the admin-level ABS API token used for metadata and library browsing when no per-user token is configured.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.UserTokenEntries
member.summary: Gets or sets the per-user ABS API token entries (XML-serializable backing store). Use for dictionary-style access in code.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.UserTokenMap
member.summary: Gets a dictionary view of for read-only lookup. Mutations must go through directly.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.IncludedLibraryIds
member.summary: Gets or sets the ABS library IDs to expose in Jellyfin. Empty list means all libraries are included.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.ProgressSyncIntervalMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets how often (in minutes) the inbound progress sync task runs. Default: 10 minutes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.EnableOutboundSync
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to push Jellyfin playback progress to ABS.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.EnableInboundSync
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to pull ABS progress into Jellyfin on schedule.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.EnableMetadataProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the metadata provider path is active. Disable when using the channel path exclusively to avoid double-display.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.EnablePodcastLibraries
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether ABS podcast libraries are included when auto-discovering libraries. When false (default), only book libraries are considered. Full podcast metadata enrichment requires a dedicated podcast provider (not yet implemented).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.TitleMatchConfidenceThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum title + author match score (0.0–1.0) required to accept a fuzzy match in the metadata provider's fallback matching logic.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration.NormalizedServerUrl
member.summary: Returns the server URL with no trailing slash, safe for URL construction.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Helpers.ItemMatcher
member.summary: Matches a Jellyfin item to an ABS library item using a prioritised cascade. Used by the metadata provider when enriching locally-scanned audiobooks.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Helpers.ItemMatcher.FindBestMatch(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.Models.AbsLibraryItem},System.Double)
member.summary: Finds the best matching ABS item for the given search parameters. Returns null if no confident match is found.
member.param: ASIN from Jellyfin provider IDs (may be null).
ISBN from Jellyfin provider IDs (may be null).
Absolute file path of the Jellyfin item (may be null).
Minimum fuzzy score (0–1) to accept a title+author match.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Helpers.ItemMatcher.FuzzyScorePublic(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Public wrapper for use by search result scoring outside this class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Helpers.TimeHelper
member.summary: Conversion helpers between ABS time units (seconds as double) and Jellyfin time units (ticks as long, where 1 second = 10,000,000 ticks).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Helpers.TimeHelper.SecondsToTicks(System.Double)
member.summary: Converts seconds (ABS) to ticks (Jellyfin).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Helpers.TimeHelper.TicksToSeconds(System.Int64)
member.summary: Converts ticks (Jellyfin) to seconds (ABS).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Helpers.TimeHelper.FromUnixMs(System.Int64)
member.summary: Converts Unix epoch milliseconds to a (UTC).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Logging.AbsFileLoggerProvider
member.summary: Registers itself with Jellyfin's and intercepts every ILogger<T> call whose source context begins with Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf, writing those entries to a daily-rolling file in Jellyfin's log directory alongside the main server log.

remarks.para: All file I/O is performed on a dedicated background thread via an unbounded so the caller never blocks while logging.
Log files are named audiobookshelf-yyyyMMdd.log and files older than days are deleted on startup.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Logging.AbsFileLoggerProvider.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Logging.AbsFileLogger
member.summary: Writes a single log entry to the shared queue. Instances are cached per category name inside .

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Plugin
member.summary: The Audiobookshelf Jellyfin plugin entry point.
member.remarks: Exposes ABS libraries as a Jellyfin channel, provides metadata/image enrichment for locally-scanned audiobooks, and syncs playback progress bidirectionally.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the singleton instance of this plugin, set during construction.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Jellyfin XML serializer used for config persistence.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers the plugin's services with the Jellyfin dependency-injection container.
member.remarks: Jellyfin requires this class to have a public parameterless constructor — it is instantiated via reflection before the DI container is built.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Providers.AbsBookMetadataProvider
member.summary: Enriches locally-scanned Jellyfin audiobooks with metadata from Audiobookshelf.
member.remarks: Only active when is true. Disable this when using the channel mode exclusively to avoid items appearing twice.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Providers.AbsBookMetadataProvider.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClientFactory,System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Providers.AbsBookMetadataProvider})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Providers.AbsImageProvider
member.summary: Provides cover art for audiobooks from Audiobookshelf.
member.remarks: The ABS cover endpoint (/api/items/:id/cover) does not require authentication, so the image URL can be passed directly to Jellyfin without embedding a token.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Providers.AbsImageProvider.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClientFactory,System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Providers.AbsImageProvider})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.TokenVault
member.summary: Token storage backed by plugin configuration. Tokens are stored in Jellyfin's standard plugin config file (XML, on-disk). A system keyring is not used because the plugin runs inside a Docker container where no keyring daemon or D-Bus session is available.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.TokenVault.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.PluginConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.TokenVault})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.TokenVault.StoreTokenAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Stores an ABS API token for a Jellyfin user.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.TokenVault.GetTokenAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the ABS API token for a Jellyfin user, or null if not mapped.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.TokenVault.DeleteTokenAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the ABS API token for a Jellyfin user.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMatch
member.summary: Represents a potential match between a Jellyfin user and an ABS user.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMatch.JellyfinUser
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin user.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMatch.AbsUser
member.summary: Gets or sets the Audiobookshelf user.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMatch.MatchType
member.summary: Gets or sets the match type.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMatch.IsSelected
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this match is selected for linking.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMatchType
member.summary: The type of user match.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMatchType.Exact
member.summary: Exact username match (case-insensitive).

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMatchType.Fuzzy
member.summary: Fuzzy username match.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMatchType.None
member.summary: No match found.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.JellyfinUserInfo
member.summary: Information about a Jellyfin user for display.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.JellyfinUserInfo.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the user ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.JellyfinUserInfo.Username
member.summary: Gets or sets the username.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.JellyfinUserInfo.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMappingService
member.summary: Service for discovering and mapping users between Jellyfin and Audiobookshelf.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMappingService.DiscoverUsersAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Discovers and matches users between Jellyfin and Audiobookshelf.
member.returns: List of user matches with match types.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMappingService.SaveMappingsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Services.UserMatch})
member.summary: Saves the selected user mappings to the token vault.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Sync.ChapterSyncTask
member.summary: Scheduled task that populates Jellyfin chapter markers from Audiobookshelf chapter data. Run this manually after a metadata refresh, or on a schedule, to keep chapter lists in sync.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Sync.ChapterSyncTask.GetDefaultTriggers
member.remarks: No default triggers — run manually after a metadata refresh or on demand.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Sync.ChapterSyncTask.__LogChaptersSavedStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Sync.InboundSyncTask
member.summary: Scheduled task that pulls ABS listening progress into Jellyfin for all mapped users. Uses "last-write-wins" based on the ABS lastUpdate timestamp.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Sync.OutboundSyncTask
member.summary: Scheduled task that pushes Jellyfin playback progress to Audiobookshelf for all mapped users. Complements , which handles real-time per-event pushes. This task is useful for bulk re-sync after ABS was unreachable, or as a periodic backstop.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Sync.OutboundSyncTask.GetDefaultTriggers
member.remarks: No default triggers — the real-time handles day-to-day pushes. This task is intended for on-demand use or as a manual backstop.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Sync.ProgressSyncService
member.summary: Pushes Jellyfin playback progress to Audiobookshelf in real time. Subscribes to and debounces updates per-item (10 s) to avoid hammering the ABS server.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Sync.ProgressSyncService.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Api.AbsApiClientFactory,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IUserDataManager,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.Audiobookshelf.Sync.ProgressSyncService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
